2606.29879.title: LWDrive: Layer-Wise World-Model-Guided Vision-Language Model Planning for Autonomous Driving
2606.29879.paper_summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) provide powerful semantic understanding and commonsense reasoning for End-to-End Autonomous Driving (E2E-AD) planning. However, trajectories directly generated by VLMs often encode only coarse driving intentions and remain insufficient for geometrically accurate, future-aware, and multi-view-grounded planning. To address these limitations, we develop the Layer-Wise World-Model-Guided Driving framework (LWDrive). LWDrive is a VLM planning framework that refines coarse trajectories through layer-wise world-model guidance. Instead of treating the VLM output as the final trajectory, LWDrive uses it as an intent-aware coarse plan, expands a diverse candidate space around it, and progressively refines the candidates through a Foresight Cascade Planner (FCP). Specifically, we introduce future-frame generation supervision to encourage the VLM to learn forward-looking scene representations, thereby injecting planning-relevant predictive dynamics into its internal hidden states. Built upon these world-model-supervised representations, FCP exploits VLM features across multiple layers and integrates historical temporal states, Action-Query representations, and current-frame multi-view Bird's-Eye-View (BEV) features to refine candidate trajectories in a coarse-to-fine manner. This design enables progressive correction of spatial positions and motion trends while grounding trajectory refinement with multi-view scene cues and preserving the high-level driving intention produced by the large model. Finally, a score head evaluates the refined candidates and selects the best trajectory as the final planning output. Experiments show that LWDrive achieves a score of 92.0 on the NAVSIM benchmark and 89.6 on NAVSIM-v2. Code and models will be made publicly available.
2606.29879.paper_summary_zh: 視覺-語言模型（VLMs）為端到端自動駕駛（E2E-AD）規劃提供了強大的語義理解和常識推理。<lb/>然而，VLMs 直接生成的軌跡通常僅編碼粗略的駕駛意圖，對於幾何準確、未來感知和多視角基礎的規劃仍然不足。<lb/>為了解決這些限制，我們開發了分層世界模型引導的駕駛框架（LWDrive）。<lb/>LWDrive 是一個 VLM 規劃框架，通過分層世界模型指導來細化粗略的軌跡。<lb/>LWDrive 不將 VLM 輸出視為最終軌跡，而是將其用作意圖感知的粗略計劃，在其周圍擴展多樣的候選空間，並通過前瞻級聯規劃器（FCP）逐步細化候選者。<lb/>具體而言，我們引入了未來幀生成監督，以鼓勵 VLM 學習前瞻性的場景表示，從而將與規劃相關的預測動態注入其內部隱藏狀態。<lb/>基於這些世界模型監督的表示，FCP 利用 VLM 特徵跨多層並整合歷史時間狀態、動作查詢表示和當前幀的多視角鳥瞰圖（BEV）特徵，以粗到細的方式細化候選軌跡。<lb/>這一設計使得空間位置和運動趨勢的逐步修正成為可能，同時用多視角場景線索來基礎化軌跡細化，並保留大型模型產生的高層次駕駛意圖。<lb/>最後，一個評分頭評估細化後的候選者並選擇最佳軌跡作為最終規劃輸出。<lb/>實驗表明，LWDrive 在 NAVSIM 基準上達到了 92.0 的得分，在 NAVSIM-v2 上達到了 89.6。<lb/>代碼和模型將公開提供。
2606.29879.author: Chen Yang et.al.
2606.29879.authors: Chen Yang, Yuhao Wei, Ze Xu, Ziheng Zou, Shuang Liang, Delin Ouyang, Lingfeng Qi, Jie Li, Guofa Li
